verdict.summary: CAN controller entered bus-off after too many transmit errors. Node disconnected from bus.

dead_ends.action: Restart CAN peripheral immediately in a tight loop
dead_ends.why_fails: Rapid restart floods bus with error frames and may force OTHER nodes bus-off
Higher speed needs tighter timing and shorter bus; usually makes it worse
Node is still disconnected; disabling interrupts just hides the state

workarounds.action: Check CAN bus termination: two 120 ohm resistors at each end
workarounds.how: Measure between CAN_H and CAN_L powered off: should read ~60 ohm

workarounds.action: Verify bit timing matches all other nodes on the bus
workarounds.how: All nodes must agree on baud rate and sample point (typically 87.5% for 500kbps)

workarounds.action: Implement bus-off recovery with backoff delay
workarounds.how: HAL_CAN_Start() after bus-off with 100ms+ delay to let bus settle
